description: This file defines REST API routes related to insurance claims and fraud detection. It includes endpoints for uploading claims, listing, retrieving, updating, and deleting claims, as well as scoring fraud, retrieving fraud signals, and high-risk claims queue. The file also contains Swagger API documentation annotations for these routes and their schemas.

methods.name: router.post('/upload-claims')
methods.description: Handles uploading of claims via CSV file, invoking claimsController.uploadClaims

methods.name: router.get('/claims')
methods.description: Retrieves a list of claims, optionally filtered by query parameters

methods.name: router.get('/claims/:id')
methods.description: Retrieves a specific claim by its ID

methods.name: router.put('/claims/:id')
methods.description: Updates a claim by its ID

methods.name: router.delete('/claims/:id')
methods.description: Deletes a claim by its ID

methods.name: router.post('/score-fraud')
methods.description: Scores fraud for a claim, either by existing claim ID or ad-hoc claim object

methods.name: router.get('/fraud-signals')
methods.description: Retrieves the catalog of fraud signals

methods.name: router.get('/high-risk-queue')
methods.description: Fetches claims flagged as high risk

methods.name: router.post('/update-outcome')
methods.description: Updates investigation outcomes and notes for a claim
